response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo brings solid full-stack engineering breadth and approximately 17 years of varied experience, which satisfies the minimum tenure requirement. However, the role demands a Director-level individual contributor with demonstrated, recognized AI expertise — the kind evidenced by shipped AI platforms, publications, or advisory relationships with strategic customers. The candidate's AI exposure is recent and narrow (MCP tooling and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq since April 2025), with no indication of cloud architecture leadership, customer-facing strategy work, or deep ML/AI research background. The seniority gap between 'Staff/Senior Software Developer' and a director-level AI strategy principal is significant and not bridged by the resume.
strengths: 17+ years of diverse engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains demonstrates genuine technical breadth.
Founder experience at GISCollective and a track record at high-scale systems (Sociomantic/Dunnhumby, millions of req/s) shows entrepreneurial initiative and performance engineering credibility.
Current role at re:cinq includes hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, indicating emerging relevance to the AI platform space.
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field and no evidence of recognized AI expertise via publications, flagship AI products, or conference talks on AI/ML topics.
Zero demonstrated cloud strategy or architecture leadership — AWS CDK usage in a pricing team is far below the cloud platform strategy fluency the role requires.
No customer advisory, partner enablement, or internal thought-leadership experience; the role explicitly requires inspiring external stakeholders and advising strategic customers on AI adoption.
